title: Ulaga Vaayaadi Lyrics Karuppan
stanzas:
Ulaga vaayaadi
odhungi nee podi
kadhal romba alandha
unna mandhirichi povendi.

Ulaga vaayaadi
odhungi nee podi
oru dhillu irundha nillu
ennathukku poochaandi.

magaraniya irundhaalume
mariyaatha venum venum.
oru aambala mudipodave
mulusaa ne maara venum.

verum vaayila molam podura
vevagaaram yaendi.
adi adiyae.

Ulaga vaayaadi
odhungi nee podi
kadhal romba alandha
unna mandhirichi povendi.
adiye ulaga vaayaadi.

ulaiyavachi sorum aakkaama
pozhuthanaikkum vela pakkaama
theruva suththi vaara
thimiraala odappendi
un kaala.

siru ponnaa nee illama
thallaadinaa adha
ennaanu pesum oore.

oru kalyanam kacheri
pannaamale
thaniyaalaa ne aava paaru.

edhu nallathu kettadhu
therinji adha seiyanum
pombala purinji.

velaiyaada nenachaale
vinaiyaagi pogume.

Ulaga vaayaadi
odhungi nee podi
kadhal romba alandha
unna mandhirichi povendi.
adiye...

valavi saththam
koyil paattaaga
kolusu saththam
kadhal seetaaga

usura vandhu modha
kadavoda uravaaven
naan kooda.

alavillaama muppodhum
kondaadinaa
adhu pinnaadi
kaattum velai.

alavennaanu munnoru
sonnaangale
adha ennaati pova keela.

oru pennidam
ulladhu poruppu
adhu nammidam
vandhidum sirappu

panivaani irundhaale
kidaiyaadhu sedhavu.

unna mandhirichi povendi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ulaga Vaayaadi, the protagonist expresses a playful and romantic sentiment, urging their beloved to embrace love and joy. The song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of romance, making it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, resonating well with the audience. The vibrant energy of the song aligns beautifully with the lively moments depicted in Karuppan.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulaga Vaayaadi from Karuppan is a vibrant celebration of love and life, brought to life by the energetic vocals of Benny Dayal. With D Imman's catchy composition and Yugabharathi's playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the rhythm and let the infectious beats elevate your mood!
stanzaMeanings: You, the world's singer, should stop and not let your love go away too far.
You, the world's singer, should stop and why should you go if you have a little hesitation?
Even if you are a queen, you need respect. A woman should not change completely just for a man.
Just talking without meaning is useless. That's it.
You, the world's singer, should stop and not let your love go away too far.
That's the world's singer.
Without making noise, you should work hard and not waste time, and keep your feet moving.
If you don't play, what will the town say about you?
If you don't perform at a wedding, you will be alone, just look at yourself.
Know what is good and bad, and act accordingly, women should understand this.
If you think about work, it will turn into fate.
You, the world's singer, should stop and not let your love go away too far. Yes...
The sound of the temple bell is like a love song.
I too have a connection with life, just like the bond with God.
If you dance without limits, it will show the work behind it.
What they said earlier is not important, just go below and see.
A woman has a responsibility, and it is a special thing that comes to us.
If you are a worker, you won't get a reward.
You, the world's singer, should stop and not let your love go away too far. You, the world's singer, should stop and not let your love go away too far.
You, the world's singer, should stop and why should you go if you have a little hesitation?
Even if you are a queen, you need respect. A woman should not change completely just for a man.
Just talking without meaning is useless. That's it.
